01-01: What are your goals for this new year?
01-02: Tell me about your favorite winter activity.
01-03: What is something you want to learn this year?
01-04: Describe a perfect winter day for you.
01-05: What did you do during the holidays?
02-01: What do you love most about February?
02-02: Tell me about someone special in your life.
02-03: What is a gift you have given or received that meant a lot?
02-04: Describe your ideal romantic or friendly date.
02-05: What is something small that makes you happy every day?
03-01: What does spring mean to you?
03-02: Tell me about a new beginning or fresh start in your life.
03-03: What is something you want to try for the first time this spring?
03-05: What is a habit you are trying to build?
04-01: How do you usually spend April?
04-02: Tell me about a goal you are working on right now.
04-03: What is your favorite thing about this time of year?
04-04: Describe a recent achievement you are proud of.
04-05: What is something that has been on your mind lately?
04-27:
Describe one of your good habits
당신이 가진 좋은 습관 하나를 말해주세요
04-28:
If you could be anywhere else in the world right now, where would you be?
지금 이 순간 세계 어디든 갈 수 있다면, 어디에 있고 싶은가요?
04-29:
Do you ever feel selfish when?
당신은 이기적이라고 느낀 적이 있나요? 언제요?
04-30:
Do you kid around a lot or are you more serious?
당신은 장난을 많이 치는 편인가요, 아니면 진지한 편인가요?
05-01:
Do people think you communicate well?
사람들이 당신을 소통을 잘하는 사람이라고 생각하나요?
05-02:
Who makes you nervous? why?
어떤 사람이 당신을 긴장하게 만드나요? 이유는요?
05-03:
How do you rate your brain power, on a scale of 1 to 10?
당신의 두뇌 능력을 1부터 10까지의 점수를 매긴다면 몇점이에요?
05-04:
What is your wildest daydream?
당신의 가장 엉뚱한 공상은 무엇입니까?
05-05:
When did you feel backed into a corner?
당신은 언제 궁지에 몰렸다고 느끼셨습니까?
05-06:
What have you done right today?
오늘 잘한 일은 무엇이에요?
05-07:
Who or what brings out the best in you?
누가 또는 무엇이 당신의 최선을 끌어내나요?
05-08:
How often do you find yourself thinking about the future?
당신은 얼마나 자주 스스로 미래에 대해 생각하고 있는 걸 깨닫나요?
05-09:
In a cartoon of your family, what would you be saying?
당신의 가족을 만화로 그린다면, 어떻게 묘사할 거에요?
05-10:
What decision made a big difference for you
어떤 결정이 당신에게 큰 변화를 만들었나요?
05-11:
If you could be a member of a band for a day, which one would it be?
만약 하루 동안 어느 밴드의 멤버가 될 수 있다면, 어떤 밴드가 되고 싶으세요?
05-12:
What would you like to shout from the rooftops?
당신은 지붕 위에서 무엇을 외치고 싶나요?
05-13: Describe a favorite spring food or tradition.
05-14: What is a goal you are focusing on this month?
05-15: What is something you want to accomplish before the end of spring?

07-03: What is your favorite summer food or drink?
